# Test for testcallgraph-coverage tool

# Create test file
mkdir -p test
exec sh -c 'echo "exec go test -cover ./..." > test/example.txt'
exec sh -c 'echo "exec mcpdiff --help" >> test/example.txt'

# Test help - exits with status 1
! exec testcallgraph-coverage
stderr 'Usage:'
stderr 'Options:'
stderr 'testcallgraph-coverage'

# Test basic analysis without coverage data
exec testcallgraph-coverage -test test/example.txt
stdout 'Programs executed:'
stdout 'go'
stdout 'mcpdiff'

# Test JSON output
exec testcallgraph-coverage -test test/example.txt -format json
stdout '"test_file":'
stdout '"programs":'
stdout '"edges":'

# Test error handling - exits with status 1
! exec testcallgraph-coverage -test nonexistent.txt
stderr 'Error'
